chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, LARKANA Constt:Petition.No.D-592 of 2021. _________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE ___________________________________________________ Before: Mr. Justice Irshad Ali Shah, Mr. Justice Shamsuddin Abbasi, 01. For orders on office objection “A”. 02. For orders on M.A.No.2608/2021 (E/ A). 03. For hearing of main case. 17.11.2021 Mr. Muhammad Afzal Jagirani, Advocate for petitioners. = * = * = * = * = * = It is contended by learned counsel for the petitioners that the petitioners have qualified the requisite test for their appointment as Primary School Teachers, therefore, the District Education Officer (Primary), Kashmore @ Kandhkot, be directed to issue such appointment orders in their favour. The requisite tests, if any, are passed by the petitioners in year 2009. Where they were for such a long period? No plausible explanation to it is offered. The instant constitutional petition being hit by laches is dismissed in limine together with listed application. J U D G E J U D G E
